---
title: "trigger_accounts"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(reticulate)

# Use venv Python ~/.venv/pytrigger
use_python("~/.venv/pytrigger/bin/python", required = TRUE)
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from trigger import TriggerDB
```

```{python}
with TriggerDB() as db:
  accounts = db.from_('accounts').limit(200).fetch()
accounts = pd.json_normalize(accounts)
```

```{r}
accounts <- reticulate::py$accounts %>%
  mutate(country = str_sub(email, end = 2)) %>%
  filter(country %in% c("CH", "DE", "GR", "IT"))
```

```{r}
accounts %>%
  mutate(active_member = !is.na(last_login)) %>%
  group_by(country, active_member) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = country, y = n, fill = active_member)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_dodge(width = .8), vjust = -.1) +
  theme_bw()
```
